provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content:
1. Short title
This Act may be cited as Biological and Toxin Weapons (Prohibition) Act.

provisions.title: Interpretation
Application of Convention
provisions.content:
3. Application of Convention
The Convention on the Prohibition of the Development, Production and Stockpiling of Bacteriological (Biological) and Toxin Weapons and on their Destruction, as set out in the Schedule to this Act and any amendments thereto, shall have force of law in Botswana.

provisions.title: Act binds the State
provisions.content:
4. Act binds the State
This Act binds the State.

provisions.title: Prohibition of the use of biological or toxin weapons

definitions.definition: the Chemical, Biological, Nuclear and Radiological Weapons Management Authority established under section 5 of the Chemical Weapons (Prohibition) Act (Cap. 24:04)
the Board established under section 7 of the Chemical Weapons (Prohibition) Act (Cap. 24:04)
such controlled agents and toxins which appear on the list established and maintained under section 6

the Convention on the Prohibition of the Development, Production and Stockpiling of Bacteriological (Biological) and Toxin Weapons and on their Destruction signed on 10 April, 1972, as set out in the Schedule to this Act, and includes any amendments thereto

the act of providing funds or financial services which are used, in whole or in part, for the manufacture, acquisition, possession, development, export, transhipment, brokering, transport, transfer, stockpiling or use of any biological or toxin weapon and its means of delivery and related materials, including both technologies and goods used for non-legitimate purposes.
